title: Tune Akson crawler PAGE_SIZE and concurrency for 4G mobile proxies
description: Analyze current akson_crawler.rs performance on mobile proxies. Propose and validate optimal PAGE_SIZE (currently 20 in code, 1000 in AGENTS.md), BATCH_SIZE, and adaptive throttle parameters to maximize throughput while keeping error rate < 5%.
verification_command: echo 'Manual verification required: check throughput, error rate, and that changes respect AGENTS.md protected parameters.'
